title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Expeditors India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!
